data.name: Fill The Fox
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Fill the Fox — A Cozy Puzzle Journey Through a World of Foxes

Somewhere between snowy peaks, golden deserts, and enchanted forests, a group of foxes have lost their way. Your job? Guide them home—one puzzle at a time.

Fill the Fox is a lighthearted, puzzle game where every level solved brings a fox closer to safety. From icy dens to mystical groves, you'll travel across a beautiful world filled with charm, mystery, and gentle wonder.

  • Solve satisfying puzzles at your own pace

  • Meet and guide foxgirls from unique cultures and environments

  • Unlock gallery content and more about the Foxes!

This isn’t just a puzzle game—it’s a calm, soulful escape into a world of warmth, beauty, and a little bit of mischief.

If you’re ready to explore, they’re ready to trust you.

data.short_description: Enter a fantastical world where lost foxes await your help. Solve clever puzzles, unlock their hidden stories, and guide each one back home across enchanted lands. Every level brings you closer to their secrets.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 1 GB VRAM compatible with DirectX
  • 音效卡: Compatible with DirectX
